title: Implement R0-R5 web app revamp
description: Implement the AskOC web app revamp tasks from docs/web-app-revamp-tdd-plan.md phases R0 through R5, including code, tests, documentation, and changelog evidence.
close_reason: Implemented R0-R5 web app revamp with tested chat/admin theme, evidence rendering, docs, and changelog.

title: Move local project ports to 9xxx range
description: Change the AskOC local API, mock services, Docker Compose defaults, smoke commands, and related documentation from the 808x/1808x conventions to a 9xxx port range so this side project avoids collisions with other local projects.
close_reason: Moved local defaults, Docker Compose, smoke scripts, tests, and docs to the 9080-9085 port range and verified the rebuilt stack.

title: Adjust AskOC UI title text styling
description: Update the chat and admin UI text styling so the AskOC product titles use the red brand treatment and related shell text stays visually consistent.
close_reason: Made chat and admin header titles use the red brand accent, added static asset test coverage, and verified the rebuilt stack.

title: Document testing and Docker developer workflow
description: Update project markdown with the Docker services, testing commands, how-to guidance, troubleshooting, and useful developer notes needed for local verification.
close_reason: Added developer testing guide, linked related docs, verified Docker stack and test gates.

title: Plan revamp web app prompt phases
description: Create or update markdown prompt planning files for the revamp branch. Incorporate DESIGN.md UX direction, brainstorm the web app surface, break work into phase prompts and tickable task lists, and make the workflow explicitly TDD-first.
close_reason: Added revamp-branch web app TDD plan with DESIGN.md UX mapping, route inventory, phase prompts, and tickable task checklists.

title: Correct DESIGN.md UX planning to AskOC MVP
description: Revise the newly added UX prompt docs so DESIGN.md is used as the visual theme for the existing AskOC AI Concierge MVP, not as a separate VoiceBox editorial product.
close_reason: Replaced separate VoiceBox product planning with AskOC-specific DESIGN.md UX theme prompts and tickable TDD phases.

title: Draft phased web app TDD prompts
description: Create or update markdown docs with a phased, tickable TDD prompt plan for the web app, grounded in DESIGN.md UX guidance.
close_reason: Added VoiceBox web app brainstorm, tickable TDD task board, prompt pack, and index/changelog references.
